about.title: About Me

about.desc: I'm 20 and I spend my time testing out new tech. I don't fit into a box: I explore, I break things, and I build them back better. My projects speak for themselves.
about.goal3: Deepening expertise in Cybersecurity and System Hardening.
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: My playground: back-end, security, and tools out of nowhere.
projects.card1.title: Chromium SaaS Extension — Manifest V3
projects.card1.desc: Full browser extension with SaaS architecture, subscription system, and secure back-end API.
projects.card2.title: BoTokard — Discord Community Engine

projects.card3.title: Python CLI — Hybrid Cryptography

discordbot.title: BoTokard: Functional Capabilities
discordbot.subtitle: A Python Discord bot designed as an asynchronous control layer between community interactions, game logic, and external APIs.
discordbot.overviewDesc: BoTokard does more than answer commands. It orchestrates gameplay, moderation, engagement features, and live operations while staying connected to a shared MySQL data model used by the web ecosystem.
discordbot.m1.title: 1. TCG Engine & Cross-Platform Economy
discordbot.m1.desc: The bot owns the complete game loop and keeps player state consistent between Discord and the web app.
discordbot.m1.i1: Secure player profile bootstrap with live tracking of XP, levels, cards, and items.
discordbot.m1.i2: Gacha and RNG pipeline with conditional drops, including special fragment assembly events.
discordbot.m1.i3: Fraud-resistant trade flow with anti-duplication and transactional consistency checks.
discordbot.m1.i4: Automated quests, achievements, and battle pass progression to reinforce retention.
discordbot.m2.title: 2. Gemini AI Integration & Engagement Tools
discordbot.m2.desc: BoTokard boosts interaction quality and community retention with adaptive AI and interactive tools.
discordbot.m2.i1: Context-aware conversational agent using Google Gemini API for adaptive replies.
discordbot.m2.i2: Dynamic poll interfaces through Discord UI components with live vote tracking.
discordbot.m2.i3: RNG and hash-based mini-games for text-channel engagement and community rituals.
discordbot.m2.i4: Feature set designed to keep channels active without flooding moderation teams.
discordbot.m3.title: 3. Database Audit Trail & Moderation
discordbot.m3.desc: A professional moderation module built for high-traffic servers and full accountability.
discordbot.m3.i1: Advanced sanction commands for warns, mutes, kicks, bans, and safe bulk purges.
discordbot.m3.i2: Every moderation action is persisted in MySQL for complete traceability.
discordbot.m3.i3: On-demand lookup of user disciplinary records directly inside Discord.
discordbot.m3.i4: Automatic log routing for moderation events, TCG transactions, and system errors.
discordbot.m4.title: 4. Twitch Broadcast Control Interface
discordbot.m4.desc: The bot acts as a streaming assistant through secure, bidirectional Twitch API integrations.
discordbot.m4.i1: Secure commands to update live metadata such as stream title and category.
discordbot.m4.i2: Webhook listeners that announce stream starts with rich-formatted alerts.
discordbot.m4.i3: Clip generation workflow with manual fallback to guarantee highlight capture.
discordbot.m4.i4: Runtime monitoring designed for reliable show control from Discord.
discordbot.m5.title: 5. High-Fidelity Audio Streaming
discordbot.m5.desc: A robust asynchronous media player designed for dependable voice channel playback.
discordbot.m5.i1: Playback state machine covering play, pause, resume, and hard stop.
discordbot.m5.i2: Dynamic queue structure for collaborative song stacking in real time.
discordbot.m5.i3: Advanced queue controls with single-track loop and full playlist loop.
discordbot.m5.i4: Built for resilient operation under concurrent user commands.
